title: List converter should ignore empty segments from extra commas
body:
When a List[int] argument is passed with extra commas such as "1,,2,", get_list_converter() currently calls type_func("") on the empty segment, raising ValueError instead of silently skipping it.

Expected: List[int]("1,,2,") == [1, 2]
Got: ValueError from int("")

Relevant code: radicli/util.py get_list_converter()
Tests live in radicli/tests/test_util.py

Please add a guard in the converter loop and add a regression test in test_util.py.
